content: Wrote CLAUDE.md at repo root from proposal-2's draft, with one correction: Startup Protocol now points at .claude-plugin/marketplace.json (Claude-native twin) instead of the Codex-native path the original draft had.
Appended Startup Protocol section to AGENTS.md per proposal-3, additive only, existing sections untouched.
Proposal-1 (.clinerules) intentionally not built. No file created, no reference added.
